InspectionFullResponse.title: InspectionFullResponse
InspectionFullResponse.description: Detail row plus checklist inputs, images, and pass/fail counts (parse-barcode parity).

device_info.title: Device Info
device_info.description: JSON object with device / browser info from PWA (userAgent, platform, etc.)

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Endpoints related to authentication, authorization, user login, token management, and access control mechanisms within the system.

tags.name: Control Tower
tags.description: Endpoints related to real-time vehicle tracking, operational status, and control tower operations.

tags.name: Masters
tags.description: Endpoints related to system master data such as vehicles, locations, drivers, configurations, and other foundational records used across operations.

tags.name: Masters - Customers
tags.description: Endpoints to view and upload customer master data, including listing active customers and bulk upload via CSV.

tags.name: Masters - Vehicles
tags.description: Endpoints to view and upload vehicle master data, including listing active vehicles and bulk upload via CSV.

tags.name: Masters - Plants
tags.description: Endpoints to view and upload plant master data, including listing active plants and bulk upload via CSV.

tags.name: Masters - Depots
tags.description: Endpoints to view and upload depot master data, including listing active depots and bulk upload via CSV.

tags.name: Masters - SKU
tags.description: Endpoints to view and upload SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) data, including listing active SKUs and bulk upload via CSV.

tags.name: Masters - Stacking
tags.description: Endpoints to view and upload stacking rules, including listing current configurations and bulk upload via CSV.

tags.name: Masters - SLA
tags.description: Endpoints to view and manage SLA (Service Level Agreement) matrix, including expected delivery times and performance benchmarks.

tags.name: Masters - UOM
tags.description: Endpoints to view and manage alternate Units of Measurement (UOMs), including conversions and base unit mappings.

tags.name: Admin - Users
tags.description: Endpoints to manage user accounts including listing users, creating, updating, and changing user statuses and roles.

tags.name: SAP - SAP API Call History
tags.description: Endpoints to view the history of SAP API calls, including request details, statuses, and timestamps for integration monitoring and troubleshooting.

tags.name: App Integration
tags.description: Endpoints to view and update integration configurations for external systems such as SAP, telemetry services, or third-party platforms.

tags.name: Optimizer
tags.description: Endpoints related to optimization jobs, including job creation, configuration, simulations, delivery plans, loading matrices, logs, and restarts.

tags.name: MIS
tags.description: Endpoints related to Management Information System (MIS), including insights, reports, dashboards, and rule configurations to support data-driven decision making.

tags.name: Integration - Masters
tags.description: Endpoints for syncing and managing master data with external systems, such as customers, vehicles, plants, and products.

tags.name: Integration - Control Tower
tags.description: Endpoints for real-time data exchange with the Control Tower, including tracking, alerts, and operational status updates.

tags.name: Integration - Transactional
tags.description: Endpoints for integrating transactional data such as orders, deliveries, PODs, and execution logs with external platforms.

tags.name: POD Admin
tags.description: Endpoints for administrative actions related to Proof of Delivery (POD), including data downloads, audit trails, and exception handling.

tags.name: POD App
tags.description: Endpoints for the mobile or field app used by drivers or delivery personnel to scan, capture, and submit Proof of Delivery data.

tags.name: Models
tags.description: Endpoints related to managing data models, including configurations, templates, and versioned structures used across planning and optimization workflows.
